label: Complex layout
description: A structure layout that supports procedural threats, crate rewards, and hostile faction assignment. Inherits from StructureLayoutDef.

threats.label: Threats
threats.description: Weighted threat entries placed in this complex. Each element name is the ComplexThreatDef defName; scalar text is the selection weight.

roomRewardCrateFactor.label: Room reward crate factor
roomRewardCrateFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the number of reward crates generated per room.

fixedHostileFactionChance.label: Fixed hostile faction chance
fixedHostileFactionChance.description: Probability that the complex is assigned a fixed hostile faction.

rewardThingSetMakerDef.label: Reward thing set maker
rewardThingSetMakerDef.description: ThingSetMakerDef used to generate reward items placed in the complex.
